MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-21-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Scott Black, Esq. 453-0555 for defendant HILL BROTHERS CHEMICAL moving party
Hugh C. Cook, Esq. of BRAYTON PURCELL 898-1555 for Plaintiff and opposing party

Mr. Black represented in open court that defendant HILL BROTHERS has been dismissed. Matter ordered OFF CALENDAR by the Court.
Mr. Cook represented in open court that Plaintiff settled with defendant FLUOR CORPORATION yesterday. There being no appearance by moving party FLUOR CORP., the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- denied -- TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT REGARDING PARA-OCCUPATIONAL EXPOSURE CAUSED BY FLUOR EMPLOYEES.
(jmm) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
